example_cases.description: detectMode returns pure_greenfield when no code and no profile
detectMode returns first_time_onboarding when code exists but no profile
example_cases.input: rootDir with .git/ and package.json but no .nopilot/profile/
example_cases.expected_output: { hasProfile: false, hasCode: true, detectedPath: 'first_time_onboarding', codeIndicators: ['git_history', 'package.json'] }

example_cases.description: detectMode returns returning_project when profile exists
example_cases.expected_output: { hasProfile: true, hasCode: true, detectedPath: 'returning_project', profileLayers: { l0: true, ... } }
example_cases.setup: Create profile with at least l0

example_cases.description: resolveFlowMode auto-resolves pure_greenfield without user choice
resolveFlowMode returns user's choice for returning_project
handleStalenessResponse triggers regeneration on user confirm
example_cases.setup: Existing profile + git repo with recent commits

example_cases.description: handleStalenessResponse records acknowledgment on user proceed
detectMode handles corrupted profile (directory exists but l0-infra.json is empty)
example_cases.input: rootDir with .nopilot/profile/l0-infra.json as empty file (0 bytes)
example_cases.expected_output: { hasProfile: false, hasCode: true/false based on code check, detectedPath: based on hasCode }

example_cases.description: detectMode handles .git directory with zero commits
example_cases.input: rootDir with .git/ (freshly initialized, no commits) and no package.json
example_cases.expected_output: { hasCode: true, codeIndicators: ['git_history'] } — initialized repo counts as existing code

example_cases.description: resolveFlowMode with returning_project and null userChoice requires user input
example_cases.expected_output: Error or state awaiting_user_choice — cannot resolve without user's explicit choice

property_cases.property: When detectMode returns pure_greenfield, resolveFlowMode always returns mode='greenfield' regardless of userChoice value
